title: Main dashboard layout with sidebar and content area
purpose: Provides a consistent layout structure for the Codex dashboard with a collapsible sidebar and main content area.
module_context: Exports a Layout component that wraps page content with a sidebar navigation and main content area. Also exports the default export for the Layout component.

steps.content: Render a flex container that fills the screen height with background styling.
Include the sidebar navigation component within the layout.
Create a main content area that expands to fill available space and enables vertical scrolling.
Wrap the provided children content within the main area with appropriate styling.
